reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio de combustibles liquidos y GNC. Posee   maxi kiosco, cafetería, sandwicheria, helados, facturas. Estacionamiento en en lugar, muchas veces cerrado con cadenas lo que dificulta dejar el auto. No dan explicaciones del motivo

(Translated by Google)
Fuel station selling liquid fuels and CNG. It has a convenience store, coffee shop, sandwich shop, ice cream, and pastries. Parking is available on-site, but often locked with chains, making it difficult to park. No explanation is given for the reason.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNOUsydnZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Tardaron un poco en atender pero estaría justificado por que llegué justo en el cambio de turno.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. They took a while to serve me, but that was justified because I arrived right at the shift change.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwdmZ6d1lREAE

reviews.comment:
Atienden bien. Es del ACA. salvo que preguntan si querés q te limpien el parabrisas. Si preguntan es xq no hay ganas

(Translated by Google)
They serve you well. It's from ACA. Except they ask if you want your windshield cleaned. If they ask, it's because they don't feel like it.
